description: Published aggregate statistics for Gulf outdoor labour heat risk. Not individual worker records.

sources.title: ILO report on occupational heat stress and Water-Rest-Shade interventions (2024)
sources.note: Nicaragua Adelante effect sizes; see data/nicaragua_baseline.json

sources.title: HeatGuard default baseline AKI incidence
sources.note: Conservative 10% per worker-season; sensitivity range 5-20% in impact.sensitivity()

gulf_outdoor_labour.note: Individual-level Gulf construction cohort data is not publicly available at scale. HeatGuard uses published intervention effect sizes plus mechanistic gap modelling vs calendar bans.

calendar_ban_coverage.note: May heat events can precede GCC ban season start (see Dubai demo).
